title: SlimyFloor (hyc modded)
description: Display slime particles when walking in a slime chunk area. (Original author: Pouille)
body:
This is a modification of [Pouille's mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/slimyfloor) (well I have almost rewritten it).

I removed the slime sound when stepping (that's frightening sometimes), made the particles' spawn anytime and decreased their amount.

The mod only works on servers, installing it on clients only makes it work in singleplayer games.

Sorry for my poor English :(
